Personal Digital Forensics Services | Digital Forensics .company <

Professional Forensic Analysis for Personal Matters

Personal digital forensics requires a delicate balance of technical expertise and discretion. Whether you are dealing with a hacked phone, suspicious device activity, or need evidence preserved for legal proceedings, we apply enterprise-grade forensic methodology to personal investigations.

Investigation Types

  • Smartphone and tablet forensic analysis (iOS & Android)
  • Computer forensic examination (Windows, Mac, Linux)
  • Email account compromise investigation
  • Social media account recovery and evidence preservation
  • Cloud storage and backup analysis
  • Deleted data recovery
  • Digital evidence preservation for court proceedings
  • Chain of custody documentation

Legal Support

All personal forensic investigations produce court-admissible reports with proper chain of custody documentation. We work directly with your attorney to ensure evidence meets jurisdictional requirements.

>

HEROPersonal digital forensics for individuals, families, and attorneys. Device analysis, account compromise investigation, and evidence preservation for legal proceedings.

Professional Forensic Analysis for Personal Matters

Personal digital forensics requires a delicate balance of technical expertise and discretion. Whether you are dealing with a hacked phone, suspicious device activity, or need evidence preserved for legal proceedings, we apply enterprise-grade forensic methodology to personal investigations.

Investigation Types

  • Smartphone and tablet forensic analysis (iOS & Android)
  • Computer forensic examination (Windows, Mac, Linux)
  • Email account compromise investigation
  • Social media account recovery and evidence preservation
  • Cloud storage and backup analysis
  • Deleted data recovery
  • Digital evidence preservation for court proceedings
  • Chain of custody documentation

Legal Support

All personal forensic investigations produce court-admissible reports with proper chain of custody documentation. We work directly with your attorney to ensure evidence meets jurisdictional requirements.

Professional Forensic Analysis for Personal Matters

Personal digital forensics requires a delicate balance of technical expertise and discretion. Whether you are dealing with a hacked phone, suspicious device activity, or need evidence preserved for legal proceedings, we apply enterprise-grade forensic methodology to personal investigations.

Investigation Types

  • Smartphone and tablet forensic analysis (iOS & Android)
  • Computer forensic examination (Windows, Mac, Linux)
  • Email account compromise investigation
  • Social media account recovery and evidence preservation
  • Cloud storage and backup analysis
  • Deleted data recovery
  • Digital evidence preservation for court proceedings

Legal Support

All personal forensic investigations produce court-admissible reports with proper chain of custody documentation. We work directly with your attorney to ensure evidence meets jurisdictional requirements.
